business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate/property holdings with scheduled office and mercantile properties in Texas.

coverages_discussed.notes: Requested TIV is from the current Locations schedule and includes Building Value 222340000, Contents Value 33432000, and BI Value 59212000. Current/prior-year TIV total is from the Prior Year SOV.

document_info.document_type: Property Statement of Values / Schedule of Locations

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Property schedule for Lone Star Property Holdings, LP with 8 scheduled Texas locations and total current TIV of 314984000. Changes from prior year effective 2026-03-15 include an added warehouse facility, deletion of an old closed location, and updated TIV per appraisal.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Scheduled locations consist of office and mercantile properties in Dallas, Houston, Plano, Fort Worth, and Southlake, Texas.

concerns: Geographic concentration in Texas, including Dallas and Houston exposures.
High aggregate property TIV of 314984000, with the largest single location at 86450000 TIV.
Current TIV is higher than the prior-year SOV total of 229053199.
Two scheduled locations list shingle roof type.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: No claims or loss history information provided in the supplied materials.
positives: All 8 scheduled locations indicate sprinkler protection.
Portfolio is predominantly fire resistive, masonry non-combustible, or non-combustible construction.
TIV was updated per appraisal effective 2026-03-15.
Most scheduled buildings were built from 2001 through 2018.
